entries.title: Hippolytus Exegetical Fragments - Scholia on Daniel on daniel 2:14
entries.excerpt: "Arioch, the captain of the king's guard" (literally, "the chief slaughterer or cook"). For as the cook slays all animals and cooks them, of a similar nature was his occupation. And the rulers of the world slay men, butchering them like brute beasts.
